/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libctrl_toolbox.so -o libctrl_toolbox.so CMakeFiles/ctrl_toolbox.dir/src/DigitalPID.cc.o CMakeFiles/ctrl_toolbox.dir/src/VirtualFrame.cc.o CMakeFiles/ctrl_toolbox.dir/src/HelperFunctions.cc.o CMakeFiles/ctrl_toolbox.dir/src/ModelKalmanFilter.cc.o CMakeFiles/ctrl_toolbox.dir/src/ExtendedKalmanFilter.cc.o CMakeFiles/ctrl_toolbox.dir/src/MeasurmentKalmanFilter.cc.o CMakeFiles/ctrl_toolbox.dir/src/ComputeTrajectory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ctrl_toolbox.dir/src/LineOfSight.cpp.o -lrml -lGeographic
